1.content:
"Hey Lisa, are these your socks?" I say, looking at the odd pair of socks in the basket, I was in the bedroom, folding laundry, and was down to the last few pairs of socks.

"No clue, maybe someone left them in the dryer before we used it?" She responded, walking into the room, which wouldn't be too far fetched, we did live in an apartment complex with a shared laundry room.

"Well, free socks I guess!" I mused to myself, pulling them closer to inspect. They looked like a woman's crew cut socks, white, but with light blue stitching accents, and blue the ends of them where the toes would go.

Jokingly I pulled my own socks off and slid the unknown socks over my own feet, noticing that I stretched them a bit, and then showed them off to Lisa.

"Well, I think they might be your new free socks, they seem a little to small-"

Suddenly I felt a weird sensation in my feet as they began to shrink down, becoming much smaller than before.

Both Lisa and I gasped, clearly she had noticed as well, but I was in more shock as it had happened to me.

"What the fuck just happened to your feet?!" She said, looking in awe at them.

"I don't know, I just put them on and they changed..." I began taking them off to reveal I now had a cute pair of small feet, complete with the toenails painted a soft purple. I wiggled them and they felt normal, but foreign at the same time.

"How did this happen, you just put on the socks, then suddenly had feminine, dainty feet?" She asked me, still extremely curious about my situation.

"Yeah, I didn't do anything else, it makes no sense!" I replied now standing up on my new, softer feet.

"Hmm, maybe they'll go back to normal if you put your own socks on?" She said, grabbing a pair out of the laundry basket, and tossing them to me, then picking up the strange socks and trying them on herself. I Slid on the pair she tossed to me, and watched as my feet began to grow again, returning to normal. I pulled to socks off to see my feet were indeed normal again, with no nail polish, only to see Lisa staring in awe at her own feet with the socks on.

"Oh my God" she said quietly, taking the socks off, revealing the same feet I had moments ago, but now on herself. She quickly put her own socks back on, then took them off, revealing hers had returned to normal as well.

"Hang on, is it these socks in particular, or us? Give me your socks" she said, tossing hers at me. We began to pull each other's on, and I felt the tingling sensation again, feeling my feet shrink, no longer stretching the black and purple socks she had tossed to me.

"Looks like it's us?" I said, looking at her, as she looked at me with intrigue.

"Hmm, I wonder..."

11.title: Becoming one another

info.brief_description: A husband and wife discover they can become other people by wearing their clothing.
info.description:
When a young couple discover that they can exchange bodies with others by wearing their clothes, they begin exploring the ins and out of their new power with each other, experiencing new perspectives and feelings for each other along the way.

This is a Mature story, but death and gore will not be tolerated, as this is a story about new experiences, including sexual ones.

The Main Characters are:

Kevin: A loving husband, 29 years old, a bit overweight at 220lbs, and 5'10''. He has brown hair, green eyes, and no piercings or tattoo, as he's not interested in them on himself. He's somewhat introverted and is fine with letting his wife take the wheel in their marriage, a big believer in "happy wife, happy life"

Lisa: An outgoing young wife, 28 years old, a slim 120lbs, at 5'8''. She has brown hair but always dyes it, and it is currently a jet black with purple highlights. Her eyes are brown, and she has multiple tattoos, and slightly gauged ears, and loves the idea of more ink and piercings. She loves her husband and respects his introverted tendencies, but does expect him to humor her with going out to try new things, hobbies, restaurants, ect.

Both of them are nerdy and like video games, anime, tv, and cosplay, which can also tie into this story in the following ways:

The changes made from others clothes are piece by piece, and can be mixed and matched. Clothes that are Costume pieces will usually change the wearer into the actual character, unless specified differently.

Other characters can be added, but aren't able to change bodies willingly, like Kevin and Lisa. When Kevin/Lisa of them swaps bodies with another person, the other person assumes the place of Kevin/Lisa and do not know of abilities, and appear to be no different than the original character.

Kevin and Lisa can lean into the memories and experiences of others while being them, allowing them to be more comfortable with new situations and life roles/ life styles.

The more they stay as one person, the harder it is to go back to their original bodies, and can become temporarily convinced that they are the person they swapped with. This can last up to a few days at the most, until something jobs their old memories and they snap out of the new mindset.

While Kevin and Lisa are a Straight Couple, they may experience non Heterosexual relationships with the changes they go through. Have fun, be nice, and experience something new!
